Entity Profile
T

Communications beacon

Technology / Ship · First seen 3307-04-08 · 5 mentions
Active: 3307-04-08 → 3307-06-11
Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3307-06-11
The Legacy of the Hesperus
Pilots report new contact from 'Salvation' near the Hesperus and Adamastor. Commander Tyler Thorsen describes receiving a request to locate old signal beacons that could help find survivors from the megaship. The Pilots Federation cautions against working for potentially criminal organisations.
3307-05-07
The Voice of 'Salvation'
The mysterious figure 'Salvation' sends a message to pilots who discovered the Hesperus, authorising Taurus Mining Ventures to pay for logs and promising further work. He claims his scientific breakthroughs will 'literally save all of humanity'.
3307-04-27
Galactic Mysteries: The Hesperus
Francesca Wolfe details the discovery of the Hesperus alongside the Scriveners Clan dredger in the Perseus Dark Region. Pilots recovered encrypted logs revealing corporate rivalry, murder, and the involvement of a shadowy figure called "Salvation" who directed the search.
3307-04-19
The Adamastor Enigma
Independent pilots report receiving anonymous instructions from a figure calling himself "Salvation," who provides a decryption key for the Adamastor's mysterious signal. The decoded transmission proves to be an automatic SOS from the Adamastor's sister ship, the Hesperus, launching a galaxy-wide search.
3307-04-08
The Awakening of the Adamastor
A dormant communications beacon aboard the 200-year-old ghost ship Adamastor in the Chukchan system suddenly activates, receiving and rebroadcasting an encrypted interstellar signal. The ship, owned by Azimuth Biochemicals, vanished in 3111 after a possible first encounter with the Thargoids.
